scenarios.name: 基础查询：合作伙伴
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Name", t.email AS "Email", t.city AS "City"
FROM res_partner AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company_closure AS h_company_2 ON t.company_id = h_company_2.parent_id
WHERE (t.partner_share = ? OR (h_company_2.distance >= 0 AND h_company_2.company_id = ?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：公司
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Company Name"
FROM res_company AS t
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：员工
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Employee Name"
FROM hr_employee AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE (rc.id IN (?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：CRM 线索
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.id AS "ID", t.name AS "Lead Name"
FROM crm_lead AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE (rc.id IN (?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：销售订单
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Order Reference", SUM(t.amount_total) AS "Total"
FROM sale_order AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
GROUP BY t.name
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：采购订单
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Order Reference"
FROM purchase_order AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：会计分录
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Number"
FROM account_move AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 基础查询：库存调拨
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Reference"
FROM stock_picking AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 聚合：公司数
scenarios.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Company Count"
FROM res_company AS t
LIMIT 1000

scenarios.name: 聚合：员工数
scenarios.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Employee Count"
FROM hr_employee AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE (rc.id IN (?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
LIMIT 1000

scenarios.name: JOIN+分组：各部门员工数
scenarios.sql:
SELECT hd.complete_name AS "Department", COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Employee Count"
FROM hr_employee AS t
LEFT JOIN hr_department AS hd ON t.department_id = hd.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE (rc.id IN (?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
GROUP BY hd.complete_name
LIMIT 1000

scenarios.name: JOIN+分组：合作伙伴按国家分布
scenarios.sql:
SELECT rc.id AS "Country", COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Partner Count"
FROM res_partner AS t
LEFT JOIN res_country AS rc ON t.country_id = rc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company_closure AS h_company_3 ON t.company_id = h_company_3.parent_id
WHERE (t.partner_share = ? OR (h_company_3.distance >= 0 AND h_company_3.company_id = ?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
GROUP BY rc.id
LIMIT 1000

scenarios.name: 自引用维度：公司及母公司
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.name AS "Company Name", rc.name AS "Parent Company"
FROM res_company AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.parent_id = rc.id
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 排序：CRM 线索按预期收入 DESC
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.id AS "ID", t.name AS "Lead Name", SUM(t.expected_revenue) AS "Expected Revenue"
FROM crm_lead AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE (rc.id IN (?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
GROUP BY t.id, t.name
ORDER BY "Expected Revenue" DESC
LIMIT 5

scenarios.name: 聚合：平均（员工总数）
scenarios.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Employee Count"
FROM hr_employee AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE (rc.id IN (?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
LIMIT 1000

scenarios.name: 基础查询：付款记录
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.payment_type AS "Payment Type", t.partner_type AS "Partner Type", rp.name AS "Partner", SUM(t.amount) AS "Amount"
FROM account_payment AS t
LEFT JOIN res_partner AS rp ON t.partner_id = rp.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
GROUP BY t.payment_type, t.partner_type, rp.name
LIMIT 10

scenarios.name: 聚合：付款统计
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.payment_type AS "Payment Type", SUM(t.amount) AS "totalAmount", COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Payment Count"
FROM account_payment AS t
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
GROUP BY t.payment_type
LIMIT 1000

scenarios.name: 基础查询：会计分录行
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.move_name AS "Journal Entry Number", aa.id AS "Account", aa.code AS "Account Code", SUM(t.debit) AS "Debit", SUM(t.credit) AS "Credit", SUM(t.balance) AS "Balance"
FROM account_move_line AS t
LEFT JOIN account_account AS aa ON t.account_id = aa.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
GROUP BY t.move_name, aa.id, aa.code
LIMIT 10

scenarios.name: 维度JOIN：按科目汇总借贷方
scenarios.sql:
SELECT aa.id AS "Account", aa.code AS "Account Code", SUM(t.debit) AS "totalDebit", SUM(t.credit) AS "totalCredit", COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Line Count"
FROM account_move_line AS t
LEFT JOIN account_account AS aa ON t.account_id = aa.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
WHERE rc.id IN (?)
GROUP BY aa.id, aa.code
ORDER BY totalDebit DESC
LIMIT 10

scenarios.name: 基础查询：产品目录
scenarios.sql:
SELECT t.default_code AS "Internal Reference", t.detailed_type AS "Product Type", pc.complete_name AS "Product Category", SUM(t.list_price) AS "Sales Price"
FROM product_template AS t
LEFT JOIN product_category AS pc ON t.categ_id = pc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company_closure AS h_company_3 ON t.company_id = h_company_3.parent_id
WHERE ((h_company_3.distance >= 0 AND h_company_3.company_id = ?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
GROUP BY t.default_code, t.detailed_type, pc.complete_name
LIMIT 10

scenarios.name: 聚合：按产品分类统计数量
scenarios.sql:
SELECT pc.complete_name AS "Product Category", COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS "Product Count"
FROM product_template AS t
LEFT JOIN product_category AS pc ON t.categ_id = pc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company AS rc ON t.company_id = rc.id
LEFT JOIN res_company_closure AS h_company_3 ON t.company_id = h_company_3.parent_id
WHERE ((h_company_3.distance >= 0 AND h_company_3.company_id = ?) OR rc.id IS NULL)
GROUP BY pc.complete_name
ORDER BY "Product Count" DESC
LIMIT 1000
